title: flying-with-sword
description: This project adds a sword-flight enchantment effect to MC, solving the problem of difficult travel in Minecraft.
body:
# FJmode · Sword Flight & Myriad Swords Return 🗡️

> **「Take the sword as wings, ride the wind; With a single thought, myriad swords return to their master」**

[![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.11-62B47A?logo=minecraft)](https://minecraft.net)
[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric-0.18.2-DBB68B?logo=java)](https://fabricmc.net)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue.svg)](LICENSE)

A Fabric enchantment expansion mod built for Minecraft 1.21.11, transforming swords from mere melee tools into your wings—your legions of thousands.

---

## ✨ Core Gameplay

### 🌪️ Sword Flight
*Ride the sword with the wind, roaming freely between heaven and earth*

| Feature | Description |
|:---|:---|
| **Flight Control** | Hold an enchanted sword to enter custom flight, with speed comparable to vanilla elytra gliding |
| **Visual Presentation** | Player stands on the sword, held sword is hidden; a matching sword model is rendered beneath the feet in real-time, following the player's pitch |
| **Dash Boost** | Press `Ctrl` during flight to trigger sustained acceleration (consumes extra saturation) |
| **Durability Balance** | Flight continuously consumes the sword's durability—plan long journeys carefully |

> ⚠️ Melee attacks against entities are disabled during flight; focus on the path of the sky

---

### ⚔️ Myriad Swords Return
*One sword strikes, myriad swords follow; a thought moves, enemies all fall*

| Feature | Description |
|:---|:---|
| **Charged Launch** | Right-click and hold to charge like a trident, release to launch the main hand sword as a flying sword |
| **Swarm Orbiting** | Multiplie flying swords orbit in three-dimensional space above the player, forming a spectacular sword formation |
| **Smart Target Lock** | Automatically locks onto and tracks targets upon melee or ranged hit |
| **Coordinated Pursuit** | Single sword calculates a guaranteed hit trajectory; the swarm strikes simultaneously, dealing damage equal to total attack power ÷ 3 |
| **Cyclic Combat** | After hitting, flying swords bounce back into formation, immediately ready to lock onto new targets for sustained output |
| **Entity Retention** | After 60 seconds or when the player goes offline, flying swords materialize and stick into the ground, awaiting retrieval |

> Obtained from the enchanting table, max level I, medium-low rarity weight

---

## 🎨 Visual Highlights

- **Sword Flight**: Sword model rotates in real-time following the player's camera angle, with natural pitch movement
- **Myriad Swords Return**: Client-side smooth interpolation combined with velocity vector-based orientation ensures fluid, jitter-free swarm trajectories; each flying sword has a 45° compensation to ensure the tip points forward

---

## 📝 Notes

- Uses **Mojang Official Mappings**; some class names in Fabric tutorials may differ (e.g., `ServerPlayer` instead of `ServerPlayerEntity`)
- Virtual flying swords for Myriad Swords Return are server-side memory objects, not vanilla entities; hit detection and damage calculation are purely server-side

---

## 🛠️ Technical Information

| Item | Version |
|:---|:---|
| Minecraft | `1.21.11` |
| Fabric Loader | `0.18.2` |
| Fabric API | `0.139.4+1.21.11` |
| Java | `21` |
| Mappings | Mojang Official |

---

*May your sword be both a shield of protection and the wind of freedom* 🍃
